title: Create Energistics - A Recipe Datapack
description: This Datapack adds compatibility between the fact that Create Applied Energistics and Applied Energistics recipes to better represent how they look ingame.
body:
This Datapack adds around 100 Hand made crafting recipes that server as alternatives for the current ones.  
To have all recipes, you will have to have to have Create, Create Additions, Create new age, on top of Applied Energistics 2, Extended AE2 and preferably WTLib for wireless stuff.

This datapack adds an Alternative Recipe to almost all Recipes from AE2 that use iron and igves the player the option to use andesite alloy from create
This datapack makes it possible to beat ae2 without touching certus quartz.

Noteable recipes: obsidian dust to silicone, most processors were replaced with precision mechanisms, alternative recipes with overcharged diamonds are available for everyone who has create new age installed on top. I am still working on adding more compat to this for Ae2 extended and the other addons but the core of Ae2 has fully been reworked(with optional recipes), the old recipes still exist.

This Datapack should be compatible with Jei and EMI etc.
